common.description: A comprehensive solution for managing properties, property types, and property owners. Use this system to keep track of your real estate portfolio and associated information.

properties.title: Properties
properties.deleteConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this property?
properties.deleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete property "{number}"? This action cannot be undone.
properties.description: Manage your real estate properties, including apartments, houses, commercial spaces, and more.

propertyTypes.title: Property Types
propertyTypes.deleteConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this property type?
propertyTypes.deleteConfirmationMessage: Are you sure you want to delete property type "{description}"? This action cannot be undone.
propertyTypes.pageDescription: Define and categorize different types of properties to better organize your real estate portfolio.
propertyTypes.deleteErrorInUse: Cannot delete property type because it has associated properties.

owners.title: Owners
owners.name: Name
owners.deleteConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete this owner?
owners.deleteConfirmationMessage: Are you sure you want to delete owner "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
owners.description: Manage property owners' information and their associated properties.
owners.deleteErrorInUse: Cannot delete owner because they have associated properties.

errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
errors.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized to access this resource.
errors.validation: Please fix the validation errors and try again.
